# VoiceInsert

> macOS menu bar app: hold a shortcut, speak, release — text into the focused field or Obsidian as Markdown. On-device Apple speech (Speech framework). macOS 13+. Download as ZIP from the site. Product walkthrough: /demo.html

## Summary for indexing

- Product: VoiceInsert — hold-to-talk / push-to-talk dictation for Mac.
- Differentiator: global shortcut, inserts into frontmost app; optional Obsidian Markdown capture; recognition stays on device (no third-party cloud ASR).
- Requirements: macOS 13 or later, Apple Silicon or Intel.

## Site

- Home: /
- FAQ (macOS dictation, Obsidian, permissions, privacy, Gatekeeper): /faq
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots: /robots.txt

## Source

- https://github.com/vushnevskuu/push-talk — main repo; Mac build for the landing lives at `web/public/VoiceInsert-macos.zip`.

## Do not

- Crawl /gate, /api/, /success (utility or non-content URLs).
